subtitles.english: Let me love you as much as I want

subtitles.original: さあ、いくぜライブ！いくぞー！
subtitles.english: Come on, let's start the live! Let's go!

subtitles.original: みんなで最高の思い出作ろうね！
subtitles.english: Let's make the best memories together!

subtitles.original: ズルズルな君だらけ
subtitles.english: Everything's full of sloppy you

subtitles.original: どうかしてるわ ねぇ、私
subtitles.english: I must be going crazy, hey, me

subtitles.english: My heart's pounding like a warning siren

subtitles.english: Hallucinations appear every day

subtitles.english: I'd rather just eat you up

subtitles.english: Surging up with a 'do-do-do'

subtitles.english: If this is love, I won't regret it anymore

subtitles.english: That's why I love you, love you, love you, love you, love you
